name: Eggnog French Toast
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour the eggnog into a shallow bowl and dip each bread slice into the eggnog, turning to coat both sides.
2. Melt 2 tablespoons of butter in a skillet over medium heat.
3. Add 2-3 slices of bread to the hot skillet and fry until golden brown.
4. Repeat with the remaining bread slices.
